author: lOrm
content: Closing as tracked-future-roadmap-not-active-bug. Phase 1 of background automation (#168) landed (BackgroundJob trait, JobScheduler, MemoryConsolidationJob, 15 tests). Phase 2 (async dispatch, auto-doc maintenance, periodic agent summarization) is forward-looking enhancement and blocked on coordinator Phase 2 (#507) anyway. Re-file when #507 lands and Phase 2 work is actively ready to start.
